markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 114-A — Drug

The term “drug” when used in this chapter, means and includes any substance listed in Public Health Law § 3306 (Schedules of controlled substances) and cannabis and concentrated cannabis as defined in section 222.00 of the penal law.

*Last modified: Apr. 9, 2021*
